meaning: n.(马术中的)环骑,[击剑]闪避,[电工]伏特
examples: Schoolboy John Doyle suffered a 25,000-volt electric shock and lived.
What is the unit of potential difference? Volt.
On average, each Volt will add electric demand equal to a couple of home refrigerators.
The other new electrified vehicle, the Chevy Volt, also saw a jump in sales.
